历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2943 → 2401 → 1649 → 1547 → 1308, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1635 places in the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1308, a further forward shift of about 239 places compared to 2024, indicating intensifying competition; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was stable at 42–43 students from 2021 to 2024, but sharply dropped to 29 students in 2025 (a reduction of about 31%), and the 2026 plan is 30 students, a slight increase of 1 student compared to 2025, still at a low level after the reduction, leading to greater competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 21st–25th in recent years (23rd in 2026), belonging to the top engineering universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (incident of students being beaten by local criminal forces, with the school accused of favoritism and inaction); Douyin heat total ranking is 74th, rated as 'average', with moderately low short video exposure; no obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 3 A+ disciplines (Aerospace Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology), 1 A-level discipline (Mechanical Engineering), and 3 A- disciplines (Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering), with prominent features in aerospace, aviation, navigation, and computer science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended, closely aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, with an estimated 113,600 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 68%, a slight decrease from 117,400 in 2025; the provincial control line for the Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 360 points, unchanged from 2024, with no significant change in exam difficulty. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and recruits across provinces; in 2025, it enrolled 13 students in Heilongjiang, accounting for about 2.17% of the university's total national enrollment, a very small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment reduction in 2025 followed by only a slight increase in 2026, the university's extremely high level, and the strong appeal of its flagship majors in aerospace, aviation, navigation, and computer science, competition is expected to intensify further in 2026; based on the 2025 baseline of 1308, the predicted minimum ranking is about 1315, with a range of 1118–1512.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Class (Computer Science)
- Aerospace Class (Smart Three Navigation Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Aerospace Class (Aviation/Aerospace).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Materials Class (Aerospace New Materials Pilot Class)
- Mechanical Class (Aerospace Intelligent Manufacturing Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1118–1512, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1118), prioritize applying for the Aerospace Class (Huang Yushan Aviation Class) and Computer Class; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 1512), mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 984 → 1073 → 923 → 1093 → 1102, with overall fluctuation between 923 and 1102, showing no clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is about 1102; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was only 2 students from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 5 in 2024, increased to 6 in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 6, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science ranking is stable at 21st–25th, belonging to the top universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation is slightly negative (campus safety incident); Douyin popularity is average; this university is a science and engineering institution with very few liberal arts majors, limited social attention; its liberal arts-related disciplines have not entered A- or above evaluation, and Foreign Language and Literature, Business Administration have no corresponding A-level discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Business Administration class has divided social popularity and is wait-and-see, Foreign Language and Literature class has average social popularity and is wait-and-see; in 2026, Heilongjiang Province has about 53,400 History Category examinees (estimated by about 32% of recent years), slightly down from 54,700 in 2025; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 405 points, basically flat with 410 points in 2024; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, belonging to cross-province enrollment; the university has very few liberal arts enrollments (only 6 in 2025), so regional preference impact is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as stable historical ranking fluctuations, unchanged enrollment plan, non-dominant liberal arts majors and average popularity, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly shift backward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly intensifies); the predicted minimum ranking is about 1113, with a range of 948–1278.
